title: Vue 2/Vuetify 2 → Vue 3/Vuetify 3 Migration
description:
Vue 2.7.16 + Vuetify 2.3.9 are both EOL with unpatched CVEs (CVE-2025-8083 CVSS 8.6 prototype pollution, CVE-2025-8082 XSS). 96 components all use class-based decorators (abandoned, no Vue 3 support). 786 Vuetify usages across 71 files.

Research completed 2026-03-12 by 7 parallel agents. Full docs at:
~/.claude/projects/-Users-alippold-github-mitre-heimdall2/vue3-migration-research/

Two plans evaluated:
- Plan A: Incremental via @vue/compat (10-14 weeks)
- Plan B: Clean frontend rewrite (12-16 weeks)

Key blocker: Vuetify 2 CANNOT run on Vue 3 even with compat mode.
Previous attempts: feature/vue3-migration (3 files), feature/nuxt-ui-modernization (ground-up)

Why: Unpatched HIGH CVEs in production, 2+ years past Vue 2 EOL
How to apply: Review plans, choose strategy, create sub-tasks for chosen approach

title: SAF Packaging Mono-Repo (RPM/DEB/APK)
description:
Centralized packaging repo (mitre/saf-packaging) for all SAF products across RPM, DEB, APK formats. Already exists with heimdall-server RPM + Go CLI.

Products: heimdall-server, vulcan, saf-cli, 101 InSpec profiles
Infrastructure: COPR (free RPM hosting), nFPM (DEB/APK from YAML), GPG signing
Air-gap: createrepo_c bundles for disconnected federal environments

Planning notes dropped at: /Users/alippold/github/mitre/saf-packaging/PLANNING-NOTES-2026-03-12.md

Why: Federal/DoD users need installable packages for air-gapped RHEL/Ubuntu/Alpine
How to apply: Continue work in saf-packaging repo, finish Phase 1 heimdall RPM testing first
